channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Meta breaks ground on over $1 billion data center in Oklahoma's Tulsa
item.description: Meta Platforms is constructing a massive $1 billion data centre in Tulsa, Oklahoma, to boost its AI infrastructure. This investment will create over 1,000 construction jobs and 100 operational roles, marking Meta's first facility in the state. The project und… [Meta]
